We only want to process a single cm handle at a time as part of this story.
The process will wake up, process each Cm-Handle individually, until there are no more in an ADVISED state, then it will sleep. And check again if there are any new CM-Handles in an advised state.

Has been discussed with team. Have decided to take the approach of querying a single cm handle at a time, due to potentially having multiple threads running carrying out the same query.

We discussed this in yesterday's standup too with Lathish.

We decided it was best to query the db each time a receive an ADVISED record and update them one at a time, due to having multiple threads running and preventing them from working on the same cm handles.
